facilities.name: North Gateway Transfer Station
facilities.address: 30205 N Black Canyon Hwy, Phoenix, AZ 85085
facilities.hours: City of Phoenix lists this transfer station as open Monday through Saturday, 5:30 AM to 5:00 PM. Confirm holiday hours before visiting.
facilities.fees: Transfer-station fees vary by load size, material type, and residency. Check the current city rate information before you drive.
not_accepted: Unapproved hazardous waste in the transfer line
facilities.rules: Secure and cover your load, follow site unloading directions, and confirm accepted materials before arrival.

facilities.name: 27th Avenue Transfer Station
facilities.hours: City of Phoenix lists this transfer station as open Monday through Saturday, 5:30 AM to 5:00 PM. Confirm holiday hours before visiting.
facilities.fees: Transfer-station fees vary by load size, material type, and residency. Check the current city rate information before you drive.

facilities.name: Phoenix Household Hazardous Waste Collection Program
facilities.address: Phoenix residents schedule pickup service; no public drop-off address
facilities.hours: The city requires an appointment for household hazardous waste pickup. Use the official city page to review current scheduling instructions before setting material out.
facilities.fees: This program is resident-focused. Confirm current eligibility, accepted items, and any fees before scheduling service.
not_accepted: Materials outside the city household program
facilities.rules: Phoenix asks residents to schedule service in advance and follow packaging guidance on the official program page.
